zh.Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Brewster於大約1566年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比時，他的父親William Brewster33歲，母親Mary Smythe33歲。他於1592年與Mary在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史盧比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1609年在荷蘭霍蘭萊登被列為assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students.。他去世於1644年4月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯享年79歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Brewster于大约1566年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾史盧比时，他的父亲William Brewster33岁，母亲Mary Smythe33岁。他于1592年与Mary在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史盧比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1609年在荷兰霍蘭萊登被列为assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students.。他去世于1644年4月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯享年79岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Brewster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a brewer of beer or ale, from Middle English brewestere, browestere ‘(female) brewer’ (from Old English brēowan ‘to brew’). Brewer is the usual term in southern England, while Brewster is mainly midland, northern, and Scottish.

History: The Mayflower Pilgrim William Brewster (1567–1644) was the son of the bailiff of the manor of Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, home of one of the earliest Puritan congregations. He was a prominent leader in Plymouth Colony from the 1620s until his death.

variants.name: Brewer
meanings: English: occupational name for a brewer of beer or ale, from Middle English brewere ‘brewer’ (an agent derivative of Old English brēowan ‘to brew’). Compare Brewster .
English (of Norman origin): Anglicized form of French Bruyère (see Bruyere ), a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, from Old French bruiere ‘heath’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of Dutch   Brouwer  , German   Brauer   or   Breuer  , etc., all occupational names meaning ‘brewer’.

variants.name: Bruster
meanings: Swiss German: variant of the topographic name Brust 2, the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.
William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.description: Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."
In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Brewster was born about 1566, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, William Brewster, was 33 and his mother, Mary Smythe, was 33. He married Mary in 1592, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1609, his occupation is listed as assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students. in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands. He died on 10 April 1644, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 79, and was buried in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Brewster est né environ 1566, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Brewster, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mary Smythe, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mary en 1592, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1609, sa profession de son indiquée est assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students. à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1644, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Er hat 1592 in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Mary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1609 ist sein Beruf als assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students. in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande aufgeführt. it.lifeSummary: Quando William Brewster è nato il circa 1566 nel Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William Brewster, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mary Smythe, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mary nel 1592, nel Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1609, la sua occupazione è indicata come assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students. nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi. ko.lifeSummary: William Brewster(이)가 대략 1566년 영국 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Brewster(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Smythe(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1609년, 그의 직업은 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students.이었다. 그는 1644년 4월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 플림우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Brewster nasceu aproximadamente 1566, em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Brewster, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mary Smythe, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary em 1592, em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1609, sua profissão aparece como assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students. em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1644, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Brewster родился около 1566 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Brewster было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Smythe, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary в 1592 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1609 году он работал по профессии assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students. в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды. Он умер 10 апреля 1644 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности плимоут, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Brewster nació aproximadamente 1566, en Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Brewster, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mary Smythe, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Mary en 1592, en Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1609, su ocupación registrada era assistant/elder to pastor john robinson; also taught english to leiden university students. en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos. Murió el 10 de abril de 1644, en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
